b1_HMS_upgrade_offer_messaging.note: Campaign-ready 1-week Easy HMS Upgrade message targeting existing doctors with WhatsApp + SMS + email + in-app channels. Includes day-by-day cadence, objection handling, and success metrics.

b2_partnership_calls_2_3.note: Package for 2–3 partnership calls with allied healthcare platforms. Includes talking points, 30-min call agenda, post-call summary template, gentle re-engagement templates, and a CSV-ready lead sheet with 8 dummy leads.
